title: Black Sesame Soup
steps: Rinse sesame and rice, then soak for 1 hour.
Blend soaked ingredients with water until smooth.
Cook over low heat while stirring until thickened.
Add rock sugar and serve warm.

title: Steamed Egg with Minced Pork
steps: Whisk eggs with warm water and strain.
Season minced pork and spread in a shallow bowl.
Pour egg mixture over pork and cover loosely.
Steam over medium heat for 10-12 minutes.
Finish with soy sauce and sesame oil.

title: Tomato Tofu Stir-Fry
steps: Cut tomatoes and tofu into bite-size pieces.
Cook tomatoes until soft and saucy.
Add ketchup and sugar, then fold in tofu gently.
Simmer briefly and top with spring onions.
